key.name: low-battery-threshold
key.description: Battery percentage at which to show low battery notification

key.name: enable-low-battery-notifications
key.description: Show notification when battery is low

key.name: enable-connection-notifications
key.description: Show notification when AirPods connect or disconnect

key.name: cycle-noise-mode-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to cycle through the enabled noise control modes
